chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1782 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.7055/25 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7056/25 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit Langah. Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that he will approach the Secretary Local Government for redressal of his grievance. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
